expectations.text: Output contains at least 10 distinct hooks
No hooks start with 'Are you...' (tired generic AI ad opener)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared
none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Hooks include concrete specifics (numbers, names, objects, situations) not vague claims
Output uses VARIETY of psychological trigger types (not all the same category)
expectations.evidence: Mix of scene, reframe, contradiction, exhaustion inventory, identity/acceptance fear, math-pressure

expectations.text: Hooks feel native to the given persona's voice/context (not generic ad copy)
expectations.evidence: Knowledge-worker parent specifics: cortisol, kids waking at 6:30, be a parent tomorrow

expectations.text: Multiple hooks specifically reference the 3am-waking pattern (not generic 'bad sleep')
expectations.evidence: Hooks 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 9 reference 3am or specific waking times

expectations.text: Hooks SHOW the pain (scene, moment, sensation) rather than TELLING it ('you're tired')
expectations.evidence: Hook 7 'you've been tired for so long', 8 'scariest part', 10 'your body' — majority tell rather than show
